title: My Heart
note_es: Ocho piezas construidas sobre los últimos latidos del corazón de mi padre. Publicado en mi cumpleaños 50. Sello: the piano label. Remixes y colaboraciones de Matthew Herbert, Matthew Dear, James Ellis Ford, Jamie Lidell. Masterizado por Taylor Deupree.
note_en: Eight pieces built on my father's last heartbeats. Released on my 50th birthday. Label: the piano label. Remixes and collaborations by Matthew Herbert, Matthew Dear, James Ellis Ford, Jamie Lidell. Mastered by Taylor Deupree.
